mapper.select: SELECT d.id AS id, d.name AS name, d.description AS description, d.published_version_count AS publishedVersionCount, d.latest_published_version_id AS latestPublishedVersionId, COALESCE(v.item_count, 0) AS latestItemCount, d.created_at AS createdAt, d.last_updated_date AS lastUpdatedDate FROM t_eval_dataset d LEFT JOIN t_eval_dataset_version v ON d.latest_published_version_id = v.id WHERE d.is_deleted = 0 AND (#{like} = '%%' OR d.name LIKE #{like}) ORDER BY d.last_updated_date DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT d.id AS id, d.name AS name, d.description AS description, d.published_version_count AS publishedVersionCount, d.latest_published_version_id AS latestPublishedVersionId, COALESCE(v.item_count, 0) AS latestItemCount, d.created_at AS createdAt, d.last_updated_date AS lastUpdatedDate FROM t_eval_dataset d LEFT JOIN t_eval_dataset_version v ON d.latest_published_version_id = v.id WHERE d.id = #{datasetId} AND d.is_deleted = 0
